description: Use for app lifecycle, settings, DI services, panel hosting, UXML service ownership, and AnchorApp access.
Use for navigation destinations, actions, popups, back-stack behavior, arguments, callbacks, animations, and Burst nav calls.
Use for view models, generated properties and commands, UXML data sources, SystemObservableObject, UIHelper, and SystemProperty fields.
Use for AppUI adapter controls, item-template data sources, command buttons, option pagers, class bindings, safe areas, and timers.
Use for debug toolbar elements, including ToolbarHelper systems, SystemObservableObject view models, View-based panels, AutoToolbar managed panels, and asmdef wiring.
